attributes.description: Alerts when `process_open_fds / process_max_fds > 80%`. FD exhaustion prevents new connections.
attributes.name: [Traefik OTel] File descriptor pressure

investigation_guide.blob:
## Traefik file descriptor pressure

### What fired
FD utilisation exceeded 80% during the window.

### Why it matters
Traefik uses FDs for every inbound and upstream connection. Exhaustion causes new connections to fail.

### Triage
1. Check concurrent connections and backends.

### Remediation
- Raise OS FD limits.

### Tuning
- 80% threshold.
